text.title: Agent Drift Detection (Statistical) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-drift-detection-statistical. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Compute baseline pass-rate + output distribution from last green eval run.
step.description: Input: eval suite. Action: Run baseline.. Output: baseline stats.

step.name: Configure CUSUM detector with k=0.5, h=4.
step.description: Input: baseline stats. Action: Author detector.. Output: CUSUM live.

step.name: Configure KL drift detector with yellow/red thresholds.
step.description: Input: baseline distribution. Action: Author detector.. Output: KL live.

step.name: Add paired t-test on judge score per metric; apply Bonferroni.
step.description: Input: baseline + new run scores. Action: Author analysis.. Output: regression test.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: baseline + new run scores.

step.name: Wire alert routing per severity band; retest policy per r5.
step.description: Input: all detectors. Action: Author alert config.. Output: alerts live.

step.name: Document runbook: 'when this alert fires, do that'.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Author runbook.. Output: runbook.
